business_ideas.idea: Hoop Group: basketball + entrepreneurship networking event combining sports and business
Solve food delivery by making it significantly better than existing terrible options
Publish custom commemorative magazine like Slam Magazine after major event
Build podcast model where you lose money but gain long-term brand and reach
Coaching high school basketball team for community impact despite financial loss
Create premium experiences for ultra-wealthy by tapping into childlike emotion and joy

predictions.text: Bigger ideas attract better talent and become easier to execute than smaller ones
Win-win projects outperform financially-motivated ones in long-term value creation
Brand strength defined by extending into adjacent categories users can imagine
